message:
feat(engine): add structured evidence JSONL emission to lockstep runner

Enable the lockstep runner to emit per-run evidence records as
newline-delimited JSON for downstream audit and CI gate consumption.

New types:
- LockstepEvidenceRecord: top-level evidence envelope with schema
  version (franken-engine.lockstep-evidence.v1), fixture counts,
  equivalence rates, divergence class distributions, and timestamps
- LockstepRuntimeVersion: pinned runtime version metadata for
  reproducibility tracking
- LockstepCategoryMatchRate: per-category equivalence rate for
  identifying weak spots in cross-runtime parity

CLI additions:
- --evidence-jsonl <path>: writes evidence records to the specified
  file, one JSON object per line, for integration with artifact
  validators and evidence ledger pipelines

Gate script updates:
- Passes --evidence-jsonl flag and includes the evidence file in
  manifest artifacts and operator verification checklist

CLI tests verify help text includes the new flag and that emitted
evidence JSONL is well-formed with deterministic runtime ordering.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -21,6 +21,7 @@ manifest_path="${run_dir}/run_manifest.json"
 events_path="${run_dir}/events.jsonl"
 commands_path="${run_dir}/commands.txt"
 report_path="${run_dir}/report.json"
+evidence_path="${run_dir}/lockstep_evidence.jsonl"
 repro_packs_dir="${run_dir}/repro_packs"
 
 trace_id="trace-lockstep-runner-${timestamp}"
@@ -88,7 +89,8 @@ run_report_step() {
       --policy-id "$policy_id" \
       --locale C \
       --timezone UTC \
-      --out "$report_path"
+      --out "$report_path" \
+      --evidence-jsonl "$evidence_path"
   )
 
   if [[ -n "$fixture_id" ]]; then
@@ -260,12 +262,14 @@ write_manifest() {
     echo "    \"events\": \"${events_path}\","
     echo "    \"commands\": \"${commands_path}\","
     echo "    \"report\": \"${report_path}\","
+    echo "    \"evidence\": \"${evidence_path}\","
     echo "    \"repro_packs_dir\": \"${repro_packs_dir}\""
     echo "  },"
     echo '  "operator_verification": ['
     echo "    \"cat ${manifest_path}\","
     echo "    \"cat ${events_path}\","
     echo "    \"cat ${report_path}\","
+    echo "    \"cat ${evidence_path}\","
     echo "    \"ls ${repro_packs_dir}\","
     echo "    \"${0} report\""
     echo "  ]"
